runtime_signals.s3_target_bucket_probe_error: Target bucket existence could not be verified because ReadRole runtime probe is unavailable.

verdict: Current head did not prove the Task 1 fix on the live path. The runtime probe failed closed before it could classify the bucket as missing, the resolver kept create_bucket_if_missing=false, and the generated bundle therefore did not take the new create-if-missing branch.
follow_up: Treat ReadRole-unavailable missing-bucket targets as a distinct blocked state instead of silently leaving existing-bucket execution executable.
Fix the generated Terraform create-if-missing dependency wiring for S3.15 before re-running live apply.
Re-run the same deleted-bucket live replay after those fixes and retain post-apply plus destroy evidence.
